thinks.think: A hand holds a smartphone displaying a map interface with a white location pin icon near the top. The screen shows blurred map details in green and beige tones. Korean subtitles at the bottom read "우리는 지도 앱을 통해 현재 위치를 파악하거나". The thumb rests on the right edge of the black device. The background remains out of focus with cool, indistinct shapes.

The Korean subtitle transitions to "어디로 이동하는지 실시간으로 알 수 있습니다." The smartphone display clarifies, showing a blue navigation arrow within a white circle and a green status bar at the top. The hand holding the black device shifts slightly, keeping the map interface centered.

A semi-transparent square graphic overlay featuring the text "Samsung Exynos 7" fades in on the left side, partially obscuring the background. The hand maintains its grip on the smartphone displaying the map interface. The Korean subtitle at the bottom remains unchanged, continuing the previous sentence.

The scene transitions to a white background displaying two microchips. A black square processor stands upright on the left, labeled "Samsung Exynos 7 QUAD PROCESSOR 7570" in white text. To its right, a second chip lies flat, revealing a grid of metallic solder balls on its underside. Korean subtitles update at the bottom.

The scene remains fixed on a black square processor labeled "Samsung Exynos 7 QUAD PROCESSOR 7570" standing upright next to a flat chip displaying a grid of solder balls. The Korean subtitle at the bottom changes to "핸드폰에 내장된 gps 장치 때문인데요" while the white background stays constant.

The scene cuts to a medium shot of a man with dark hair and round glasses wearing a grey t-shirt. He sits in a cluttered room filled with shelves of electronics and miscellaneous items, gesturing with his right hand while speaking. New Korean subtitles appear at the bottom of the frame.

The video cuts to a medium shot of a man with dark hair and round glasses wearing a grey t-shirt. He sits in a cluttered room with shelves of electronics behind him, gesturing with his hands. The Korean subtitles at the bottom change from mentioning navigation to stating that life is very convenient.

The man in the grey shirt continues speaking as the Korean subtitles change to discuss looking at map apps while moving. A digital map interface featuring white roads, green areas, and a blue location dot fades in, overlaying the man and eventually dominating the screen space.

A digital map interface overlays the scene, featuring white roads, green patches, and a blue location dot with a white arrow. A small vehicle icon appears near the dot. Zoom controls with plus and minus signs sit on the right. Korean subtitles remain at the bottom as the map dominates the view.

A digital map overlay dominates the view, displaying white roads and green patches. Korean text reading "경주최씨충의공 최몽량신도비" appears near the top center. The blue location dot stays central. Subtitles at the bottom change to "본인이 서있는 현 위치가 지도에 바로바로 반영이 되는 게 아니라". The man in the grey shirt remains partially visible behind the overlay.

The digital map overlay persists, centering a blue location dot on a white road amidst green patches. Korean text labeling a specific site appears near the top. The camera zooms in on the leftmost product listing on the shopping page, focusing on a black GPS device. A yellow highlight box appears around the text "10hz" in the product title. The subtitle updates to mention a speed difference of up to 10 times compared to standard phone GPS.

The subtitle "그리고 꽤나 정확한 것 같습니다." remains at the bottom while the blue location dot moves on the map.

A man with short dark hair and round wire-rimmed glasses, wearing a grey t-shirt, sits in a room with shelves of various items behind him. He faces the camera and speaks, with white Korean subtitles at the bottom reading "이렇게 직접 만든 GPS 를 테스트해 보았는데요".

A man with short dark hair, round glasses, and a grey t-shirt sits in a cluttered room facing the camera. He speaks while white Korean subtitles reading '이렇게 직접 만든 GPS 를 테스트해 보았는데요' remain at the bottom. Shelves filled with various items like figurines and boxes are visible behind him.

A man with dark hair, round glasses, and a grey t-shirt continues speaking in a cluttered room. The white Korean subtitles at the bottom change from discussing testing a self-made GPS to mentioning an effect where the resolution of the movement path increases. His mouth is open mid-sentence.

A man with dark hair, round glasses, and a grey t-shirt speaks in a room filled with shelves. The white Korean subtitles at the bottom change from mentioning an effect where movement path resolution increases to saying 'it is good.' His right hand moves slightly while gesturing, and the background remains static with various objects on shelves.

A man with dark hair, round glasses, and a grey t-shirt continues speaking and gesturing with his right hand in a cluttered room. The white Korean subtitles at the bottom update from "있어서 좋습니다." to "그렇지만 단점도 있어요 핸드폰 GPS와 다르게".

A man in a grey shirt and glasses speaks indoors with his hand raised. The scene cuts to an outdoor view looking up at buildings and power lines against a blue sky. Subtitles at the bottom change to explain that accuracy drops when buildings are nearby.

The scene cuts from an outdoor view of buildings and power lines against a blue sky to a close-up of a digital map interface. Large white text reading '건물 위에 있는 나' overlays the map, showing a blue location dot near '29-6'. The subtitle about accuracy dropping near buildings remains at the bottom.

The video cuts to a wide outdoor shot of a green mountain range under a clear blue sky. A tall street lamp is visible on the left side. White Korean subtitles at the bottom read "그래서 산이나 탁 트인 곳에서 사용을 해야 돼요", indicating a recommendation for open spaces.

The video maintains a wide shot of a green mountain range under a clear blue sky. A tall metal street lamp stands on the left, while bare tree branches appear in the foreground. The white Korean subtitle at the bottom remains visible, suggesting usage in open spaces.

The scene cuts from the outdoor mountain view back to the man indoors, wearing a grey t-shirt and round glasses. He sits in a cluttered room with shelves behind him, gesturing with his right hand while speaking as the Korean subtitle changes at the bottom of the screen.

A man with dark hair, round glasses, and a grey t-shirt speaks in a cluttered room, gesturing with his right hand. White Korean subtitles at the bottom display '어느 게 더 좋다 나쁘다를 얘기하려는 건 아닙니다'. Behind him, shelves hold various items and a computer monitor is visible on the right.

The man in the grey shirt gestures while speaking. The scene transitions to a close-up of a smartphone screen mounted on a car dashboard. The screen displays scrolling lines of white text. A red triangular hazard button and part of an orange figurine are visible on the right.

A smartphone screen mounted on a car dashboard displays rapidly scrolling lines of white text data. The 'Traffic' speed value at the top right corner changes slightly from 5.91 to 5.39 kbps. A red triangular hazard button and a portion of an orange figurine are visible on the right side.

The smartphone screen shows scrolling technical data lines. Subtitles state that only minimal information like time, latitude, and longitude is displayed. A large white Korean text overlay reading 'Time' appears on the left side of the phone screen.

On the smartphone screen displaying scrolling data, large white Korean text overlays accumulate vertically on the left side. Initially showing only the character for 'Time', the text expands to include 'Latitude' below it, and finally adds 'Longitude' at the bottom of the stack, while the subtitles regarding minimal information remain constant.

On the smartphone screen displaying scrolling data, additional large white Korean text overlays appear next to the existing vertical stack. The new text characters translate to "Altitude" and "Satellite Count," expanding the list of metrics. Simultaneously, the subtitle at the bottom updates to list altitude, connected satellite count, and satellite information.

Large white Korean text reading 'Satellite Information' appears on the phone screen overlay, completing the vertical list. The scene cuts to the man in the grey shirt and glasses in his room. He gestures with both hands while speaking as the subtitle updates to mention sending more diverse information.

The man with dark hair, round glasses, and a grey t-shirt continues speaking in the cluttered room. His mouth remains open as he talks, and his hands gesture slightly near the bottom of the frame. The white Korean subtitle at the bottom stays constant, reading '더 다양한 정보를 보내주죠'.

The man in the grey shirt and glasses holds up a light blue rectangular object wrapped with a rubber band. It resembles a small battery pack or electronic device. The subtitle text changes at the bottom to describe this new item's function regarding information transmission speed and volume.

The man switches from holding a light blue rectangular object wrapped in a rubber band to holding a black smartphone with a pink case edge. He gestures with the phone in his right hand as the subtitles update to explain that phones transmit more information.

The man continues holding the black smartphone with a pink strap edge in his right hand. He gestures with the device while speaking to the camera. The subtitle regarding phones sending more information remains at the bottom. The cluttered background with shelves and electronics stays consistent.

The man lowers the black smartphone with the pink strap edge out of the frame. He continues speaking to the camera with his hands now empty. The white Korean subtitle text at the bottom updates to a new sentence.

A man with dark hair, round glasses, and a grey t-shirt sits in a cluttered room with shelves behind him. He speaks directly to the camera while white Korean subtitles at the bottom of the screen change to a new sentence. His facial expression shifts slightly as he talks.

A man with dark hair, round glasses, and a grey t-shirt sits in a cluttered room with shelves behind him. He speaks to the camera, his facial expression shifting slightly. The white Korean subtitles at the bottom update to a new sentence asking if this is good knowledge to share with someone nearby.

A man with dark hair, round glasses, and a grey t-shirt sits in a cluttered room. The white Korean subtitle at the bottom disappears. He lowers his right hand from a raised gesturing position to rest his arms, continuing to face the camera directly while speaking.

The man in the grey t-shirt and round glasses remains seated in the cluttered room. The white Korean subtitles at the bottom of the screen disappear completely. He continues to look at the camera with a neutral expression, his arms resting in front of him. The background containing shelves and electronics remains static.

summary.text: [0-4] A hand holds a black smartphone displaying a map interface with a white location pin, transitioning to a blue navigation arrow in a white circle and green status bar. Subtitles read "우리는 지도 앱을 통해 현재 위치를 파악하거나" then "어디로 이동하는지 실시간으로 알 수 있습니다." [4-6] A semi-transparent "Samsung Exynos 7" graphic overlays the left. [6-10] On a white background, a black square processor labeled "Samsung Exynos 7 QUAD PROCESSOR 7570" stands beside a flat chip showing solder balls. Subtitles change from "이것을 가능하게 만든 것이 바로" to "핸드폰에 내장된 gps 장치 때문인데요". [10-14] A man with dark hair, round glasses, and a grey t-shirt sits in a cluttered room with electronics shelves, gesturing as subtitles shift from "이것 덕분에 내비게이션, 길 찾기 등" to "생활에서 엄청나게 편리함을 누리고 있습니다."

[14-22] A man in a grey shirt speaks as subtitles read "그런데 이동 중에도 지도 앱을 관심 있게 보신 분들이라면". A digital map overlay with white roads, green areas, a blue location dot, and zoom controls fades in. Text "경주최씨충의공 최몽량신도비" appears. Subtitles change to "본인이 서있는 현 위치가 지도에 바로바로 반영이 되는 게 아니라" then "뚝뚝 끊겨서 반영이 된다는 것을 아실 겁니다." [22-24] The map fades, revealing the man in a grey t-shirt and round glasses gesturing in a cluttered room. [24-28] The scene cuts to a dark-mode map with grey roads and labels "토로라이프", "원주추어탕". A yellow circular icon with a flame symbol sits above a blue navigation arrow. Yellow subtitles read "아니거든? 그 지도 어플만 그렇지" then "내비게이션에선 부드럽게 나오거든??". Labels "솔토장어" and "명성교육원" appear.

[30-32] The man in the grey shirt changes his gesture from holding up two fingers to pointing his index finger upward as a semi-transparent map overlay with a blue arrow and yellow line fades in, accompanied by new Korean subtitles. [32-36] The map overlay persists with blue road lines and a white navigation arrow; red circular camera icons appear vertically on the upper segment while the subtitle reads "제 생각에는, 뚝뚝 끊기는 부분을 앱에서 자연스럽게 이어주는 것 같은데요". [36-38] The yellow line vanishes and new subtitles state "천천히 자세히 한번 보시죠". [38-40] The view switches to a vertical close-up of the map interface framed by thin bars, showing grey roads, blue lanes, two red camera icons, and a white arrow. [40-42] A large solid green circle appears on the right side of the map close-up, with a red camera icon remaining visible at the bottom left.

[42-44] A vertical map view displays blue road lines and a white arrow. A large green circle on the right turns solid red, and a text box with Korean characters "(끊기는 부분)" appears beneath it; a red camera icon remains fixed bottom-left. [44-46] The circle reverts to solid green, and the text box disappears. [46-48] The circle turns red again with the text box reappearing. [48-50] The scene cuts to a man in a grey t-shirt and round glasses in a cluttered room. He gestures with his right hand as the subtitle "보통의 일반적인 휴대폰의 경우," appears. [50-52] He raises his hand with spread fingers, and the subtitle updates to "아니 시중에 존재하는 거의 모든 스마트폰의 gps가,".

From 54-56s, a man in a grey t-shirt and round glasses speaks while lowering his right hand near his chest with fingers curling, accompanied by the subtitle '1초에 1번 위치정보를 업데이트한다고 하는데요'. Between 56-60s, he continues talking; his hand lowers slightly before raising with spread fingers in an emphatic gesture, while the text changes to '만약 핸드폰 지도 앱을 켜서 본인의 위치가 뚝뚝 끊기면서 반응이 되는 게 아니라'. From 60-62s, he maintains the raised hand position as the subtitle updates to '아주 부드럽게 물 흘러가듯이 쭉 이동을 한다면', all set against a static background featuring shelves, electronics, and an orange Iron Man helmet.

[64-68] A man in a grey t-shirt and round glasses speaks in a cluttered room, gesturing near his chest then raising his right hand. Subtitles change from "쓰고 계신 핸드폰 기종을 알려주세요," to "제가 알기로는 그런 핸드폰이 없어서,". Shelves with an orange helmet are visible behind him.
[68-72] The subtitle updates to "그런 기능을 해주는 외장 gps 장치가 시중에 있습니다" as a semi-transparent overlay of a product listing featuring black and red GPS devices fades in. The view transitions to a full-screen online shopping page displaying external GPS devices, including black and red units priced at ₩120,000 and ₩250,000, while the subtitle remains fixed.

[62-64] A man in a grey t-shirt gestures with his right hand while speaking, with subtitles reading "아주 부드럽게 물 흘러가듯이 쭉 이동을 한다면" over a cluttered background featuring an orange helmet. [72-74] The scene cuts to a product listing for a black GPS device, where a yellow box highlights "10hz" in the title "블루투스 외장 gps 10hz qstarz bt-q818xt". Subtitles note a speed difference of up to 10 times compared to standard phone GPS. [74-78] The view pans right to a red GPS device in "CAROUND" packaging labeled "qstarz bl-818gt 블루투스 외장 gps 10hz" priced at "₩170,000". The camera focuses on another red device listing where "10hz" is highlighted in yellow, while subtitles explain that detailed route recording is possible.

From [80-88], a man in a grey shirt and round glasses speaks while gesturing with his right hand near his chest, set against shelves holding an orange helmet. Initially, the subtitle reads '1초에 한 번보다 10번이 표현하는 해상도가 훨씬 더 좋겠죠'. At [82], the text changes to '그래서 오늘은 외장 gps 제품을 여러분들께 한번' as he continues his explanation. By [84], the subtitle updates to '소개 시켜드리진 않을 거고요' while his hand remains raised. Finally, at [86], the text displays '딱히 아는 제품도 없고' as he concludes his thought, maintaining his position in the cluttered room.

[88-94] A man in a grey shirt and round glasses speaks to the camera, gesturing with his right hand. Behind him are shelves filled with items, including an orange helmet. Subtitles read "외장 gps를 사지 않아도", followed by "원하는 기능을 충분히 직접 구현을 할 수가 있으니까", and finally "한번 만들어보도록 하겠습니다". [94-96] The scene cuts to a close-up of a hand holding a small blue circuit board featuring a silver square chip and gold pins along the edge, positioned over a light brown wooden table.

[96-98] A hand displays a blue PCB with a central silver square chip and gold edge pins, labeled with the subtitle 'gps 모듈과'. [98-100] The view shifts to a green PCB with a black chip and white antenna trace, followed by a blue board with a USB port held by tweezers, as text reads '그리고 충전 단자에서 떼어낸 5핀'. [100-102] Tweezers isolate the detached metal USB connector component, indicating the input section is prepared ('입력 부분을 준비했습니다'). [102-104] Finally, a hand holds a tiny blue component, with subtitles suggesting the remaining parts might be utilized later ('이거 남은 부분은 나중에 활용할 수도 있으니까').

Two hands arrange electronic modules on a wooden table, including a blue GPS board, a green circuit board with a white antenna wire, and a small USB component. The hands hold the green board and blue module, showing connections via red, blue, black, and white wires. Subtitles appear: "여기 이 준비한 장치들을 대충 전선으로 어지럽게 연결하는 게 아니라," noting the messy wiring. The text updates to "견고하고 깔끔하게 연결되도록 PCB 기판을 제작해서 붙이겠습니다," explaining the plan to manufacture a PCB board for a sturdy, clean connection. Finally, the hands gesture with open palms around the components on the table.

[104-106] A hand holds a small blue circuit board, initially showing the chip side before rotating it to display a silver USB port on the edge, while white Korean subtitles appear at the bottom. [114-116] The video cuts from hands arranging components on a table to a digital schematic of a colorful PCB board on a dark screen, featuring red and blue traces with labels like "Ultimate GPS" and "USB", as subtitles discuss drawing the circuit for PCB manufacturing. [116-118] The camera zooms in on the digital PCB schematic, revealing detailed components including yellow pads labeled 'GND' and red rectangular elements, with white text 'PCB EDGE' and '20329' visible near the bottom while the subtitles persist. [118-120] The schematic view shifts to show a row of circular gold pads labeled 3.3V, VBAT, FIX, TX, RX, and GND next to label J1 against a dark blue background, differing from the previous focus on red rectangular components, while the Korean subtitle remains unchanged at the bottom.

A man in a grey t-shirt and round glasses gestures in a cluttered room with an orange helmet while subtitles compare resolution frequencies [78-80]. The view switches to a digital schematic on a dark background with red circuit traces and yellow pads [120-122]. It zooms in on the lower section showing connections to gold pads and two red rectangular components, with subtitles reading "저도 기존의 도면 파일을 활용해서" and "생각보다 쉽게 만들었습니다" [122-124]. The schematic stays on screen as the text changes to "그리고 필요한 기능이 몇 개 없어서," noting missing functions [124-126].

[128-130] View switches to white interface with "PCB", "SMT-Stencil", "3D-Printing" tabs. Blue progress bar shows "Uploading your files..." at 26% above "Layers", "Dimensions: 100 * 100 mm", "PCB Qty: 5". Subtitle: "만든 파일을 압축해서".
[130-134] Progress bar advances 54% to 82%, text changes to "Processing Gerber files...". "Base Material: FR-4" selected. Subtitle: "JLC PCB에 들어가 업로드해서 주문합니다." Screen shows green board preview: "Detected 1 layer board of 49.3x25.53mm(1.94x1.01 inches)."
[134-136] Interface zooms on green board layout showing yellow pads and green traces. Text: "Shipping Method: DHL Express Worldwide", "PCB Qty: 5", "Different Design: 1", "Delivery Format: Single PCB". Subtitle remains.

[136-138] A computer screen displays a zoomed-in preview of a green circuit board layout featuring green conductive traces and gold pads, with visible text "PCB Qty: 5" and "Different Design: 1". [138-140] Following a glitchy blue and orange block transition, a hand holds a blue box printed with the white logo "JLC JLCPCB", while subtitles state "외국에서 배송됐는데 1주일도 안 돼서 도착했어요". [140-142] The person opens the box to reveal a plastic bag containing green circuit boards, as subtitles explain "상자를 열면 이렇게 직접 만든 PCB 기판이". [142-144] Two hands hold the clear bag with green rectangular boards over the open blue box on a wooden surface, noting in subtitles "예쁘게 포장되어 들어있네요" while adjusting the bag to display the contents clearly.

[144-146] Two hands hold a clear plastic bag containing green rectangular circuit boards over a wooden table. The right hand pulls the top edge to tear the packaging, while a blue box sits on the left; subtitles disappear. [146-148] A person extracts a small green circuit board. The left hand holds it up for inspection, displaying its surface, while the right hand retains the open bag over the table. [148-150] The person presents the board to the camera, displaying silver solder pads and white text markings. [150-152] The right hand grasps the opposite edge to tilt the board, revealing white conductive traces connecting components against the wooden table surface.

[152-156] A person holds a small green rectangular PCB featuring silver solder pads and white conductive traces over a wooden table, tilting it slightly. [156-158] They bring a blue GPS module with a silver square component into the frame next to the green board, accompanied by subtitles "자 이렇게 pcb까지 만들었고, 여기에 부품들을 장착하기 전에". [158-160] The view changes to a white breadboard where a blue microcontroller board connected via a black USB cable illuminates a red LED, wired to the blue GPS module, with subtitles "gps 모듈의 업데이트 횟수가 1초에 1번으로 기본 세팅되어 있는데". The scene ends showing a computer screen with code and a serial monitor window as subtitles read "10Hz로 세팅할게요".

[160-166] A white breadboard rests on a wooden desk, holding a blue microcontroller board with an illuminated red LED connected via multicolored wires to a blue GPS module, with a black keyboard visible in the background, while Korean subtitles explain the GPS module is default set to update once per second. [166-168] The view cuts to a computer screen displaying a code editor and a serial monitor window scrolling with timestamped GPRMC data lines, as the subtitles update to state "10Hz로 세팅할게요".

[168-176] A computer screen shows a code editor beside a serial monitor window displaying scrolling lines of timestamped data strings starting with '$GPRMC'. The view zooms in on the monitor as the text updates rapidly, accompanied by Korean subtitles at the bottom reading '10Hz로 세팅할게요'. The timestamps on the left side advance rapidly from 20:11:05 to 20:11:08 as new data entries appear continuously. At the bottom of the window, checkboxes labeled in Korean for auto-scroll and timestamp display are visible.

[176-178] A computer screen displays a serial monitor window where lines of timestamped data strings starting with '$GPRMC' scroll upwards rapidly. The timestamps advance from roughly 20:11:07.3 to 20:11:07.9. To the left, code text including 'Serial.println(PMTK_SET_NMEA_UPDATE_10HZ)' is visible at the bottom of the editor window. [178-180] The scene transitions to a close-up of a green circuit board held by a metal alligator clip. A small silver USB connector is visible. White Korean subtitles appear, indicating that the setup is finished and soldering onto the PCB will begin. [180-184] A soldering iron with a black tip enters, touching the silver USB port on the green PCB held by a metal clamp. A hand holding the red-handled tool appears, applying heat to the connector's pins to solder the component securely onto the PCB surface.

[184-186] The soldering iron is removed after securing the silver connector. The view cuts to a wider angle showing the green circuit board now holding a blue GPS module with a silver square chip. A metal clamp secures the board while red and white wires lie on the wooden surface nearby. [186-192] A soldering iron tip applies heat to the pins connecting the blue GPS module to the green PCB held by the clamp. A hand holds a thin strand of solder wire near the contact point to fuse the components, with smoke rising from the hot iron near the silver square chip.

A soldering iron tip presses pins connecting a blue GPS module to a green circuit board held by a metal clamp. A hand holds solder wire near the junction, maintaining connection as smoke rises. Screen: receiver, external GPS connected by the location, to 33 satellites, 1.0 Hz, Accuracy 4 m, Altitude 63 m. Text: 핸드폰의 기본 GPS는 초당 1회인 1Hz로 업데이트되는데요. Live, SOBTAILGPS, Bluetooth GPS receiver, Connected, 5.6 kb/s, fixed to 0 satellites, 10.0 Hz, Time 15:44:39.900 22/2/2, 4 KB, Altitude precision, DOP, Distance, km. Text: 직접 만든 GPS를 핸드폰과 연결하면 초당 10회 업데이트인 10Hz라고 표시가 됩니다.

From 200-206s, a soldering iron tip presses against pins connecting a blue GPS module to a green PCB held by a metal clamp. A hand holds solder wire near the junction as smoke rises from the heat, fusing the components. At 206s, the view switches to a split screen. On the left, a man in a black jacket and white mask holds a black smartphone, overlaid with text '핸드폰 GPS'. The right side shows a map interface labeled '핸드폰 화면' with a blue marker on a green area. The background features a paved parking lot with trees and cars under a blue sky.

[208-216] A split-screen displays an outdoor parking lot with cars and trees on the left, labeled '핸드폰 GPS', and a digital map labeled '핸드폰 화면' on the right. A person in a black jacket and white mask holds a black smartphone, showing a blue marker on the map's green area. The individual walks away across the pavement, causing the blue marker to shift along the path. Finally, the person, now seen wearing glasses, turns and walks back toward the camera while checking the phone, as the map marker continues tracking their position on the layout.

[216-218] A person wearing a black jacket and white mask walks closer to the camera, looking down at a black smartphone. The right split-screen shows a digital map interface labeled '핸드폰 화면' with a blue location marker on a green area. The text overlay reads '핸드폰 GPS'. [218-220] The white text overlay changes to '외장GPS' as the person holds a blue box with an attached green circuit board below the black smartphone. [220-224] The person turns away and walks across a paved lot holding the phone and blue device. The split-screen map labeled '핸드폰 화면' displays the location marker shifting slightly along a path while the '외장GPS' text remains visible.

[224-228] A person in a black jacket walks away across a paved lot while a blue location marker shifts on the right map; the subtitle '뭔가 살짝씩 튀는데??' appears then disappears. [228-232] The person continues walking as the marker moves further along the path. The subtitle '오 막 순간이동 하는데?' appears and remains visible. The text '외장GPS' stays at the top left throughout.

[232-234] A person wearing a black jacket, white mask, and glasses stands near the camera holding a black smartphone, with the text "외장GPS" displayed. [234-240] The text overlay changes to "핸드폰 GPS" as the individual runs away across the paved lot. On the right split-screen map labeled "핸드폰 화면", a blue location marker moves progressively further along a white path, visually tracking the person's movement away from the starting point.

From 240-244, the person in the black jacket continues running away across the paved lot, appearing smaller. The white text '핸드폰 GPS' stays at the top left. On the right '핸드폰 화면' map, the blue location dot moves further along the curved white road, tracking distance. The individual in the black jacket and white mask runs forward, appearing larger in the frame on the left. On the right, the digital map displays the blue location dot moving further along the curved white road, corresponding to the person's movement towards the viewer. Text overlay switches from "핸드폰 GPS" to "외장 GPS". The individual in the black jacket and white mask runs away from the camera across the paved lot. On the right, the map interface displays the blue location marker moving along a straight path segment, tracking person's movement away from the viewpoint.

[248-256] An individual dressed in a black jacket runs away from the camera across a paved lot, moving toward a white wall and parked cars in the background. The white text "외장 GPS" remains visible at the top left corner throughout the sequence. On the right split-screen, a map interface labeled "핸드폰 화면" displays a blue location dot that advances along a white path. This movement on the map corresponds to the runner's increasing distance from the camera. As the person runs further away and appears smaller near the wall, the blue dot on the map continues to track their position along the path.

[256-258] A person in a black jacket and white mask runs toward the camera across a paved lot. The text "외장 GPS" appears top-left. On the right, a map interface labeled "핸드폰 화면" shows a blue dot moving along a white path.
[258-264] The runner exits the frame, leaving the lot empty with parked cars and long shadows. A shadow of the camera operator holding a device is cast bottom-right. The text "외장 GPS" persists. On the map, the blue marker continues advancing along the path, tracking the unseen individual's position.

[264-266] Beneath white "외장 GPS" text, the paved lot is empty except for a camera shadow; the map interface displays a blue location marker on a white path indicating an off-screen position. [266-268] The layout splits with the map on the left and video on the right. A person in a black jacket runs away across the lot, tracked by the advancing blue marker, while subtitles state '사실 이것은 자동차처럼 빠르고'. [268-272] The runner continues away, appearing smaller near a white wall, as the marker advances along the path. Subtitles change to "지속적으로 이동하는 상황에서 빛을 발해요" and persist as the individual moves further into the distance.

[272-276] Inside a silver car, a hand places a white rectangular GPS device with exposed green circuitry onto the black dashboard near the windshield. The subtitle '그래서 자동차로 테스트해 보겠습니다' is displayed as sunlight glares through the glass during the positioning. [276-280] The scene cuts to a close-up of a smartphone screen showing a navigation map with the large white text "핸드폰 GPS" in the upper left corner. A blue dot marks the current location on the digital map, while black car dashboard controls are visible along the right edge, confirming the mobile GPS test setup.

[280-282] A smartphone screen displays a navigation map with green and yellow areas. White text "핸드폰 GPS" is overlaid in the upper left. A blue location marker advances slightly along the digital road. A subtitle appears at the bottom reading "(1초에 1번 새로고침 됨)". A red ring light is visible on the left dashboard.
[282-284] The large white text overlay switches from '핸드폰 GPS' to '외장 GPS', signaling a change in the GPS source. The blue dot remains on the road. Black car dashboard elements with white icons are visible on the right edge.
[284-288] The screen continues to display "외장 GPS". The blue location marker advances further along the road path. A new subtitle appears at the bottom center reading "빠르게 새로고침 됨". The map shows road details and zoom controls.

[288-290] Smartphone screen displays map interface with white text "외장 GPS" top-left and subtitle "빠르게 새로고침 됨" bottom-center as blue location marker advances slightly. [290-292] View shifts from close-up road to wider perspective showing blue route line; subtitle disappears while yellow marker "5" and text "대공원역 (서울랜드)" appear bottom-left. [292-296] Blue marker continues moving along path past the yellow icon near station text, with black dashboard controls visible on the right edge throughout.

[296-302] The smartphone screen labeled "외장 GPS" displays a blue location marker moving smoothly forward along a road path, passing a U-turn arrow and a yellow marker labeled "5". The map interface scrolls to track the position while black dashboard buttons remain visible on the right. [302-304] The blue marker advances onto a section showing parking space outlines labeled "140-14" near text reading "에덴농원" and approaches "주차장입구" at the bottom. Subtitles appear stating "굉장히 빠르고 자연스럽죠?" followed by "그리고 꽤나 정확한 것 같습니다."

[306-308] The view widens to a smartphone on the dashboard, revealing a red hazard button, orange figurine, and glowing red engine start button as "외장 GPS" text disappears; the subtitle "그리고 꽤나 정확한 것 같습니다." remains. [308-314] A man with short dark hair, round wire-rimmed glasses, and a grey t-shirt sits in a cluttered room with shelves of items. He speaks as subtitles change from "이렇게 직접 만든 GPS 를 테스트해 보았는데요" to "이동경로의 해상도가 높아지는 효과가".

A man with dark hair, round glasses, and a grey t-shirt speaks in a room filled with shelves, gesturing with his right hand [314-318]. Subtitles transition from mentioning increased movement path resolution to "있어서 좋습니다." and then "그렇지만 단점도 있어요 핸드폰 GPS와 다르게". The scene cuts to an outdoor view looking up at buildings and power lines against a blue sky [318-320]. Subtitles explain that accuracy drops when buildings are nearby: "주변에 약간의 건물만 있어도 정확도가 떨어지는 단점이 있습니다". The view changes to a digital map interface showing a blue location dot near '29-6' [320-322]. Large white text "건물 위에 있는 나" overlays the map while the subtitle about accuracy remains.

From 322s to 328s, the video maintains a fixed wide outdoor shot of a green mountain range under a clear blue sky. A tall metal street lamp stands on the left, and bare tree branches are visible in the foreground; these visual elements remain unchanged throughout the sequence. White Korean subtitles at the bottom consistently read "그래서 산이나 탁 트인 곳에서 사용을 해야 돼요," indicating a recommendation for using the device in open spaces like mountains. At 328s, the scene cuts from the outdoor mountain view back to the man indoors. He is wearing a grey t-shirt and round glasses, seated in a cluttered room with shelves behind him. He gestures with his right hand while speaking as the Korean subtitle changes at the bottom of the screen.

A man (dark hair, round glasses, grey t-shirt) speaks in a cluttered room with shelves and a monitor [330-332], gesturing right hand. Subtitle: '어느 게 더 좋다 나쁘다를 얘기하려는 건 아닙니다'. The scene transitions to a smartphone on a car dashboard [332-334], displaying scrolling white text near a red triangular hazard button and orange figurine. The 'Traffic' speed value changes from 5.91 to 5.39 kbps [334-336]. Finally, the subtitle '최소한의 정보인 시간과 위도, 경도 정도만 나타내고요' appears with a large white Korean text overlay reading 'Time' on the left [336-338].

[338-340] On a smartphone screen showing scrolling data, large white Korean text overlays stack vertically on the left: first '시간' (Time), then adding '위도' (Latitude), and finally '경도' (Longitude), accompanied by the subtitle "예를 들어 기본적인 정보인 시간, 위도, 경도에 플러스". [340-342] Additional white text overlays appear to the right, reading '고도' (Altitude) and '위성 수' (Satellite Count), while the subtitle updates to "고도, 연결된 위성의 개수, 위성의 정보 등". [342-344] The overlay list completes with '위성 정보' (Satellite Information). The scene cuts to a man in a grey shirt and glasses gesturing with both hands in a cluttered room, as the subtitle reads "더 다양한 정보를 보내주죠".

[126-128] A static digital schematic of a circuit board is displayed on a dark blue background, showing red traces connecting yellow pads to components, accompanied by a subtitle about the simple design. [344-346] A man with dark hair, round glasses, and a grey t-shirt speaks in a cluttered room with shelves and an Iron Man helmet; subtitles read '더 다양한 정보를 보내주죠' and '이렇게 정리하면 되겠네요'. [346-348] He presents a light blue rectangular object wrapped in a rubber band, showing a circuit board on the back, while the subtitle states '이것은 빠른 대신 그만큼 적은 정보를 보내주고'. [348-350] He replaces the object with a black smartphone featuring a pink case edge, gesturing as the final subtitle explains '핸드폰의 경우에는 느린 대신 더 많은 정보를 보내준다.' regarding information volume.

[6-10] On a white background, a black square processor labeled "Samsung Exynos 7 QUAD PROCESSOR 7570" stands beside a flat chip showing solder balls. Subtitles change from "이것을 가능하게 만든 것이 바로" to "핸드폰에 내장된 gps 장치 때문인데요". [10-14] A man with dark hair, round glasses, and a grey t-shirt sits in a cluttered room with electronics shelves, gesturing as subtitles shift from "이것 덕분에 내비게이션, 길 찾기 등" to "생활에서 엄청나게 편리함을 누리고 있습니다."

[14-22] A man in a grey shirt speaks as subtitles read "그런데 이동 중에도 지도 앱을 관심 있게 보신 분들이라면". A digital map overlay with white roads, green areas, a blue location dot, and zoom controls fades in. Text "경주최씨충의공 최몽량신도비" appears. Subtitles change to "본인이 서있는 현 위치가 지도에 바로바로 반영이 되는 게 아니라" then "뚝뚝 끊겨서 반영이 된다는 것을 아실 겁니다." [22-24] The map fades, revealing the man in a grey t-shirt and round glasses gesturing in a cluttered room. [24-28] The scene cuts to a dark-mode map with grey roads and labels "토로라이프", "원주추어탕". A yellow circular icon with a flame symbol sits above a blue navigation arrow. Yellow subtitles read "아니거든? 그 지도 어플만 그렇지" then "내비게이션에선 부드럽게 나오거든??". Labels "솔토장어" and "명성교육원" appear.

[30-32] The man in the grey shirt changes his gesture from holding up two fingers to pointing his index finger upward as a semi-transparent map overlay with a blue arrow and yellow line fades in, accompanied by new Korean subtitles. [32-36] The map overlay persists with blue road lines and a white navigation arrow; red circular camera icons appear vertically on the upper segment while the subtitle reads "제 생각에는, 뚝뚝 끊기는 부분을 앱에서 자연스럽게 이어주는 것 같은데요". [36-38] The yellow line vanishes and new subtitles state "천천히 자세히 한번 보시죠". [38-40] The view switches to a vertical close-up of the map interface framed by thin bars, showing grey roads, blue lanes, two red camera icons, and a white arrow. [40-42] A large solid green circle appears on the right side of the map close-up, with a red camera icon remaining visible at the bottom left.

Two hands arrange electronic modules on a wooden table, including a blue GPS board, a green circuit board with a white antenna wire, and a small USB component. The hands hold the green board and blue module, showing connections via red, blue, black, and white wires. Subtitles appear: "여기 이 준비한 장치들을 대충 전선으로 어지럽게 연결하는 게 아니라," noting the messy wiring. The text updates to "견고하고 깔끔하게 연결되도록 PCB 기판을 제작해서 붙이겠습니다," explaining the plan to manufacture a PCB board for a sturdy, clean connection. Finally, the hands gesture with open palms around the components on the table.

[104-106] A hand holds a small blue circuit board, initially showing the chip side before rotating it to display a silver USB port on the edge, while white Korean subtitles appear at the bottom. [114-116] The video cuts from hands arranging components on a table to a digital schematic of a colorful PCB board on a dark screen, featuring red and blue traces with labels like "Ultimate GPS" and "USB", as subtitles discuss drawing the circuit for PCB manufacturing. [116-118] The camera zooms in on the digital PCB schematic, revealing detailed components including yellow pads labeled 'GND' and red rectangular elements, with white text 'PCB EDGE' and '20329' visible near the bottom while the subtitles persist. [118-120] The schematic view shifts to show a row of circular gold pads labeled 3.3V, VBAT, FIX, TX, RX, and GND next to label J1 against a dark blue background, differing from the previous focus on red rectangular components, while the Korean subtitle remains unchanged at the bottom.

A man in a grey t-shirt and round glasses gestures in a cluttered room with an orange helmet while subtitles compare resolution frequencies [78-80]. The view switches to a digital schematic on a dark background with red circuit traces and yellow pads [120-122]. It zooms in on the lower section showing connections to gold pads and two red rectangular components, with subtitles reading "저도 기존의 도면 파일을 활용해서" and "생각보다 쉽게 만들었습니다" [122-124]. The schematic stays on screen as the text changes to "그리고 필요한 기능이 몇 개 없어서," noting missing functions [124-126].

From 322s to 328s, the video maintains a fixed wide outdoor shot of a green mountain range under a clear blue sky. At 328s, the scene cuts from the outdoor mountain view back to the man indoors. He is wearing a grey t-shirt and round glasses, seated in a cluttered room with shelves behind him. He gestures with his right hand while speaking as the Korean subtitle changes at the bottom of the screen.

A man (dark hair, round glasses, grey t-shirt) speaks in a cluttered room with shelves and a monitor [330-332], gesturing right hand. Subtitle: '어느 게 더 좋다 나쁘다를 얘기하려는 건 아닙니다'. The scene transitions to a smartphone on a car dashboard [332-334], displaying scrolling white text near a red triangular hazard button and orange figurine. The 'Traffic' speed value changes from 5.91 to 5.39 kbps [334-336]. Finally, the subtitle '최소한의 정보인 시간과 위도, 경도 정도만 나타내고요' appears with a large white Korean text overlay reading 'Time' on the left [336-338].

[338-340] On a smartphone screen showing scrolling data, large white Korean text overlays stack vertically on the left: first '시간' (Time), then adding '위도' (Latitude), and finally '경도' (Longitude), accompanied by the subtitle "예를 들어 기본적인 정보인 시간, 위도, 경도에 플러스". [340-342] Additional white text overlays appear to the right, reading '고도' (Altitude) and '위성 수' (Satellite Count), while the subtitle updates to "고도, 연결된 위성의 개수, 위성의 정보 등". [342-344] The overlay list completes with '위성 정보' (Satellite Information). The scene cuts to a man in a grey shirt and glasses gesturing with both hands in a cluttered room, as the subtitle reads "더 다양한 정보를 보내주죠".

[126-128] A static digital schematic of a circuit board is displayed on a dark blue background, showing red traces connecting yellow pads to components, accompanied by a subtitle about the simple design. [346-348] He presents a light blue rectangular object wrapped in a rubber band, showing a circuit board on the back, while the subtitle states '이것은 빠른 대신 그만큼 적은 정보를 보내주고'. [348-350] He replaces the object with a black smartphone featuring a pink case edge, gesturing as the final subtitle explains '핸드폰의 경우에는 느린 대신 더 많은 정보를 보내준다.' regarding information volume.
